results.title: Trump says Iran talks unlike Obama deal
results.description: Washington, May 24, (SocialNews.XYZ) US President Donald Trump on Sunday defended his administration's ongoing negotiations with Iran, sharply criticising the Obama-era nuclear agreement and asserting that the current talks would prevent Tehran from acquiring a... results.title: Dodgers' Kiké Hernández could make his season debut Monday against Rockies
results.description: MILWAUKEE (AP) — Los Angeles Dodgers utilityman Kiké Hernández is expected to be activated in time to make his season debut Monday after recovering from surgery on his left elbow.
